name: 03-recipes
description: Prompt to generate test data: ``` Create for me a recipes.json file, as an array of objects, each object consisting of the following keys - name - description - ingredients, array of objects, each object has name, unit and amount - list of associated tags (make sure to refer to the id and the name in tags.json using the $oid format) - cuisine (make sure to the to the id and the name in cuisines.json using the $oid format) - instructions as an array of strings ```
